description: Self-monitoring lens: does this platform help me defend my rating, brief my board, and prioritize remediation?

stops.label: home-dashboard
stops.note: First impression: does the landing view orient a security executive or a vendor analyst?

stops.label: my-scorecard
stops.note: The company's own scorecard: grade legibility, factor breakdown, trust in the score, time-to-'so what'.

stops.label: score-issues
stops.note: Issue list: can I tell which findings actually drive my score and which three things to fix first?

stops.label: risk-quantification
stops.note: Financial impact / risk quantification: is this board-credible dollars-at-risk framing or a black box?

stops.label: report-center
stops.note: Board reporting: how close to 'attach to the board deck' is the output? What's missing for an audit committee?

stops.label: rules-alerts
stops.note: Alerting/rule builder: can I control noise? Would this create alert fatigue for my team?

stops.label: attack-surface
stops.note: Attack Surface Intelligence: is the asset attribution accurate and actionable, or a source of disputes?
